rationale: Review 1's only finding references an external roadmap document not visible in the diff and describes a potential future API collision rather than actual duplication; acting on it would be premature generalization based on an unverifiable claim. Review 2 correctly approves appropriate reuse of Mathlib primitives, but since Review 1's finding is speculative rather than wrong-in-a-harmful-way, both paths leave the PR essentially equally good for the reuse rubric.
